session.user:
Run these commands and report results. Do NOT modify any files:
1. `uv run ruff check src/erk/core/fast_llm.py src/erk/core/commit_message_generator.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/core/llm_caller.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/core/fakes.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/rewrite_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/update_pr_description.py src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py tests/core/test_commit_message_generator.py tests/core/test_fast_llm.py` 2. `uv run ruff format --check src/erk/core/fast_llm.py src/erk/core/commit_message_generator.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/core/llm_caller.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/core/fakes.py tests/core/test_commit_message_generator.py tests/core/test_fast_llm.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py` 3. `uv run pytest tests/core/test_commit_message_generator.py tests/core/test_fast_llm.py -v`
Report the output of each.
